news.title:
Route Mobile's Dec 2025 net sales dropped 9.9% Y-o-Y to Rs 185.9 cr; net profit rose 4.6% to Rs 30.4 cr.
EBITDA grew 3.6% to Rs 44.5 cr; EPS increased to Rs 4.82 from Rs 4.61; shares closed at Rs 514.75 on Feb 19, 2026.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's Dec 2025 net sales dropped 9.9% Y-o-Y to Rs 185.9 cr; net profit rose 4.6% to Rs 30.4 cr.
EBITDA grew 3.6% to Rs 44.5 cr; EPS increased to Rs 4.82 from Rs 4.61; shares closed at Rs 514.75 on Feb 19, 2026.

news.title:
Route Mobile appoints new CEO with telecom sales expertise. Q3 revenue slightly down YoY due to ILD business decline.
Gross profit margin up 340 bps YoY with a shift to higher-margin segments; steady PAT margins amid ongoing investments.
news.summary:
Route Mobile appoints new CEO with telecom sales expertise. Q3 revenue slightly down YoY due to ILD business decline.
Gross profit margin up 340 bps YoY with a shift to higher-margin segments; steady PAT margins amid ongoing investments.

news.title:
Route Mobile Ltd shared its Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting a leadership change with Tushar Agnihotri assuming the CEO role. The transition aims to enhance execution and growth focus.
The company reported improved gross margins at 24.5% due to a strategic shift to higher-margin domestic and regional businesses, despite a slight revenue decline from lower-margin international messaging.
news.summary:
Route Mobile Ltd shared its Q3 FY26 earnings call transcript, highlighting a leadership change with Tushar Agnihotri assuming the CEO role. The transition aims to enhance execution and growth focus.
The company reported improved gross margins at 24.5% due to a strategic shift to higher-margin domestic and regional businesses, despite a slight revenue decline from lower-margin international messaging.

news.title:
Route Mobile reported Q3 & 9M FY25-26 revenue of 44,523 mn, EBITDA 5,237 mn LTM.
Board announced Rs.3/share interim dividend; focus remains on WhatsApp solutions and global clients.
news.summary:
Route Mobile reported Q3 & 9M FY25-26 revenue of 44,523 mn, EBITDA 5,237 mn LTM.
Board announced Rs.3/share interim dividend; focus remains on WhatsApp solutions and global clients.

news.title:
Route Mobile's Q3FY26 revenue dipped to ₹1107.06 cr from ₹1183.79 cr YoY.
PAT rose to ₹102.56 cr from ₹85.47 cr YoY; profit margins improved.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's Q3FY26 revenue dipped to ₹1107.06 cr from ₹1183.79 cr YoY.
PAT rose to ₹102.56 cr from ₹85.47 cr YoY; profit margins improved.

news.title:
Route Mobile's board approved Rs. 3 interim dividend per share for FY26, with a record date of February 13, 2026.
CEO role transitions as Mr. Rajdipkumar Gupta becomes MD, and Mr. Tushar Agnihotri is appointed as new CEO to drive growth.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's board approved Rs. 3 interim dividend per share for FY26, with a record date of February 13, 2026.
CEO role transitions as Mr. Rajdipkumar Gupta becomes MD, and Mr. Tushar Agnihotri is appointed as new CEO to drive growth.

news.title:
Route Mobile Ltd deregisters its step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Route SMS Solutions Zambia Ltd, effective Jan 6, 2026.
The subsidiary had no operations, revenue, or net worth since incorporation; details disclosed under SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Route Mobile Ltd deregisters its step-down wholly-owned subsidiary, Route SMS Solutions Zambia Ltd, effective Jan 6, 2026.
The subsidiary had no operations, revenue, or net worth since incorporation; details disclosed under SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Route Mobile's board to meet on Feb 9, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 financials and consider a third interim dividend.
Earnings call scheduled for Feb 10, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 results. Details available on Route Mobile's website.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's board to meet on Feb 9, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 financials and consider a third interim dividend.
Earnings call scheduled for Feb 10, 2026, at 4:30 PM IST to discuss Q3 results. Details available on Route Mobile's website.

news.title:
Route Mobile Ltd appoints Seckin Arikan as Chairman and Additional Non-Executive Director effective Jan 22, 2026.
Mark James Reid resigns as Chairman citing personal commitments; board committees reconstituted accordingly.
news.summary:
Route Mobile Ltd appoints Seckin Arikan as Chairman and Additional Non-Executive Director effective Jan 22, 2026.
Mark James Reid resigns as Chairman citing personal commitments; board committees reconstituted accordingly.

news.title:
Route Mobile Ltd allotted 5,500 equity shares under RML ESOP 2017, raising paid-up capital to Rs. 63.0 Cr.
3,000 stock options under RML ESOP 2021 were canceled due to employee cessation; details available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Route Mobile Ltd allotted 5,500 equity shares under RML ESOP 2017, raising paid-up capital to Rs. 63.0 Cr.
3,000 stock options under RML ESOP 2021 were canceled due to employee cessation; details available on the company's website.

news.title: Route Mobile Ltd announces the cancellation of ESOPs.
news.summary: Route Mobile Ltd announces the cancellation of ESOPs.

news.title:
Route Mobile's evaluation revised due to financial health shifts, market dynamics.
Quarterly results and performance indicators reveal operational, technical challenges.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's evaluation revised due to financial health shifts, market dynamics.
Quarterly results and performance indicators reveal operational, technical challenges.

news.title:
Route Mobile's revenue grew 0.5% YoY, 6.5% QoQ to INR 11,194M, gross profit up 5.2% YoY.
EBITDA surged 16% QoQ to INR 1,333M, margin at 11.9%; 85% revenue from transactional SMS.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's revenue grew 0.5% YoY, 6.5% QoQ to INR 11,194M, gross profit up 5.2% YoY.
EBITDA surged 16% QoQ to INR 1,333M, margin at 11.9%; 85% revenue from transactional SMS.

news.title:
Route Mobile shared its Q2 FY26 earnings call transcript, showcasing 6.5% revenue growth and a gross profit margin improvement to 22.1%.
The company highlighted strong EBITDA growth, strategic partnerships, and new product traction, emphasizing sustainable, profitable growth.
news.summary:
Route Mobile shared its Q2 FY26 earnings call transcript, showcasing 6.5% revenue growth and a gross profit margin improvement to 22.1%.
The company highlighted strong EBITDA growth, strategic partnerships, and new product traction, emphasizing sustainable, profitable growth.

news.title:
Route Mobile hits 52-week low at Rs. 693.05 amid ongoing decline.
Negative results for 3 quarters and reduced institutional interest raise concerns.
news.summary:
Route Mobile hits 52-week low at Rs. 693.05 amid ongoing decline.
Negative results for 3 quarters and reduced institutional interest raise concerns.

news.title:
Godfrey Phillips, Power Grid, Ajanta Pharma announced dividends of Rs 17, Rs 4.5, and Rs 28 per share, record date Nov 10.
Route Mobile, Aurionpro, Transcorp also declared dividends of Rs 3, Rs 1, and Rs 0.2; Nov 7 is the last buy date.
news.summary:
Godfrey Phillips, Power Grid, Ajanta Pharma announced dividends of Rs 17, Rs 4.5, and Rs 28 per share, record date Nov 10.
Route Mobile, Aurionpro, Transcorp also declared dividends of Rs 3, Rs 1, and Rs 0.2; Nov 7 is the last buy date.

news.title:
Route Mobile announces 2nd interim dividend of ₹3/share, taxable post April 1, 2020.
TDS rates vary by PAN, residency; shareholders advised to update KYC and exemption documents.
news.summary:
Route Mobile announces 2nd interim dividend of ₹3/share, taxable post April 1, 2020.
TDS rates vary by PAN, residency; shareholders advised to update KYC and exemption documents.

news.title:
Route Mobile's revenue stable at Rs.1119.4 crore YoY, PBT fell to Rs.2 crore.
Net loss stood at Rs.18.8 crore; EPS reported negative at Rs.3.37 per share.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's revenue stable at Rs.1119.4 crore YoY, PBT fell to Rs.2 crore.
Net loss stood at Rs.18.8 crore; EPS reported negative at Rs.3.37 per share.

news.title:
Route Mobile's board approved Q2 & H1 FY2025 results, declaring Rs 3/share interim dividend.
Reported lapse of 3,000 stock options due to employment cessation, with detailed cash flow data.
news.summary:
Route Mobile's board approved Q2 & H1 FY2025 results, declaring Rs 3/share interim dividend.
Reported lapse of 3,000 stock options due to employment cessation, with detailed cash flow data.

news.title:
Route Mobile Ltd announces updated link for Nov 4, 2025 earnings call.
Details and documents for the call are on www.routemobile.com.
news.summary:
